get.description: Fetches Kalshi market data with optional filtering by market ticker, event ticker, status, and volume. Returns markets with details including pricing, volume, and status information.

parameters.name: market_ticker
parameters.description: Filter markets by market ticker(s). Can provide multiple values.

x-doc.desc_en: Restrict results to one or more specific Kalshi markets by their market ticker.
x-doc.title_zh: 按一个或多个 Kalshi 市场的 market ticker 限定返回结果。

parameters.name: event_ticker
parameters.description: Filter markets by event ticker(s). Can provide multiple values.

x-doc.desc_en: Restrict results to markets belonging to one or more events, identified by event ticker.
x-doc.title_zh: 按一个或多个 event ticker 限定返回属于这些事件的市场。

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search markets by keywords in title and description. Must be URL encoded (e.g., 'bitcoin%20price' for 'bitcoin price').

x-doc.desc_en: Keyword query matched against market title and description; the value must be URL-encoded.
x-doc.title_zh: 针对市场标题与描述的关键词检索，取值需经 URL 编码。

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter markets by status (whether they're open or closed)

x-doc.desc_en: Filter by trading state: `open` markets still accept trades, `closed` markets no longer do.
x-doc.title_zh: 按交易状态筛选：`open` 表示仍可交易，`closed` 表示已停止交易。

parameters.name: min_volume
parameters.description: Filter markets with total trading volume greater than or equal to this amount (in dollars)

x-doc.desc_en: Keep only markets whose total trading volume is at least this amount, in dollars.
x-doc.title_zh: 仅保留总成交量不低于该金额的市场，单位为美元。

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of markets to return (1-100). Default: 10.

x-doc.desc_en: Number of markets to return per page.
x-doc.title_zh: 每页返回的市场数量。

parameters.name: pagination_key
parameters.description: Base64-encoded cursor for efficient pagination. Returned in the previous response's pagination object.

x-doc.desc_en: Opaque cursor for fetching the next page; take it from the pagination object of the previous response.
x-doc.title_zh: 用于翻到下一页的不透明游标，取自上一次响应的 pagination 对象。

x-doc.desc_en: Ticker of the event this market belongs to.
x-doc.title_zh: 该市场所属事件的 ticker。

x-doc.desc_en: Ticker uniquely identifying this market; use it to query price, trades or order book.
x-doc.title_zh: 唯一标识该市场的 ticker，可用于查询价格、成交记录或订单簿。

title.example: Will a representative of the Democratic party win the NYC Mayor race in 2025?

x-doc.desc_en: Human-readable question the market resolves.
x-doc.title_zh: 市场所裁决问题的可读标题。

start_time.description: Unix timestamp in seconds when the market opens

x-doc.desc_en: When trading on the market opens.
x-doc.title_zh: 市场开放交易的时间。

end_time.description: Unix timestamp in seconds when the market is scheduled to end

x-doc.desc_en: Scheduled time at which the market is expected to end.
x-doc.title_zh: 市场预计结束的计划时间。

close_time.description: Unix timestamp in seconds when the market actually resolves/closes (may be before end_time if market finishes early, null if not yet closed)

x-doc.desc_en: When the market actually resolved and closed; may precede end_time if it finished early, and is null while still open.
x-doc.title_zh: 市场实际裁决并关闭的时间；若提前结束可能早于 end_time，仍开放时为 null。

x-doc.desc_en: Current trading state: `open` still accepts trades, `closed` no longer does.
x-doc.title_zh: 当前交易状态：`open` 仍可交易，`closed` 已停止交易。

x-doc.desc_en: Price of the most recent trade.
x-doc.title_zh: 最近一笔成交的价格。

x-doc.desc_en: Cumulative trading volume since the market opened.
x-doc.title_zh: 自市场开放以来的累计成交量。

x-doc.desc_en: Trading volume over the trailing 24 hours.
x-doc.title_zh: 过去 24 小时的成交量。

x-doc.desc_en:
Final outcome of the market once resolved; null while unresolved.
[⚠️Note:已裁决时 result 的具体取值集合源码未说明，待研发确认。]
x-doc.title_zh:
市场裁决后的最终结果；未裁决时为 null。
[⚠️批注:已裁决时 result 的具体取值集合源码未说明，待研发确认。]

x-doc.desc_en: List of matching Kalshi markets.
x-doc.title_zh: 匹配的 Kalshi 市场列表。

x-doc.desc_en: Page size that was applied to this response.
x-doc.title_zh: 本次响应实际采用的每页数量。

total.description: Total number of markets matching the filters

x-doc.desc_en: Total number of markets matching the filters across all pages.
x-doc.title_zh: 在所有分页中匹配筛选条件的市场总数。

has_more.description: Whether there are more markets available

x-doc.desc_en: Whether further pages of results remain.
x-doc.title_zh: 是否还有更多分页结果。

pagination_key.description: Base64-encoded cursor for the next page. Only present when there are more results.

x-doc.desc_en: Cursor to pass as pagination_key on the next request; present only when more results remain.
x-doc.title_zh: 下次请求作为 pagination_key 传入的游标，仅在还有更多结果时出现。

x-doc.desc_en: Pagination metadata for the result set.
x-doc.title_zh: 结果集的分页元信息。

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid parameters or validation errors

x-doc.desc_en: Short machine-readable error code for the failed request.
x-doc.title_zh: 请求失败时的简短机器可读错误码。

message.example: limit must be a number between 1 and 100

x-doc.desc_en: Human-readable explanation of why the request was rejected.
x-doc.title_zh: 对请求被拒原因的可读说明。

x-doc.heading_zh: 查询 Kalshi 市场 get_kalshi-markets
x-doc.desc_en: List Kalshi prediction markets with their pricing, volume and status, optionally filtered by market ticker, event ticker, keyword search, status or minimum volume. Results are cursor-paginated.
x-doc.description_zh: 列出 Kalshi 预测市场及其价格、成交量与状态，可按 market ticker、event ticker、关键词、状态或最小成交量筛选。结果采用游标分页。

get.description: Fetches historical trade data for Kalshi markets with optional filtering by ticker and time range. Returns executed trades with pricing, volume, and taker side information. All timestamps are in seconds.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: The Kalshi market ticker to filter trades

x-doc.desc_en: Restrict trades to a single Kalshi market by its ticker.
x-doc.title_zh: 按 market ticker 将成交记录限定到单个 Kalshi 市场。

x-doc.desc_en: Lower bound of the trade time window; only trades at or after this moment are returned.
x-doc.title_zh: 成交时间窗的下界，仅返回该时刻及之后的成交。

x-doc.desc_en: Upper bound of the trade time window; only trades at or before this moment are returned.
x-doc.title_zh: 成交时间窗的上界，仅返回该时刻及之前的成交。

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of trades to return (default: 100)

x-doc.desc_en: Maximum number of trades to return per page.
x-doc.title_zh: 每页返回的成交记录数量上限。

parameters.name: pagination_key
parameters.description: Base64-encoded cursor for efficient pagination. Returned in the previous response's pagination object.

x-doc.desc_en: Opaque cursor for fetching the next page; take it from the pagination object of the previous response.
x-doc.title_zh: 用于翻到下一页的不透明游标，取自上一次响应的 pagination 对象。

x-doc.desc_en: Identifier uniquely referencing this individual trade.
x-doc.title_zh: 唯一引用该笔成交的标识。

x-doc.desc_en: Ticker of the market on which the trade executed.
x-doc.title_zh: 该笔成交所属市场的 ticker。

x-doc.desc_en: Number of contracts exchanged in this trade.
x-doc.title_zh: 该笔成交中交换的合约数量。

x-doc.desc_en: Execution price of the yes side, expressed in cents.
x-doc.title_zh: yes 一侧的成交价格，以分计。

x-doc.desc_en: Execution price of the no side, expressed in cents.
x-doc.title_zh: no 一侧的成交价格，以分计。

x-doc.desc_en: Execution price of the yes side, expressed in dollars.
x-doc.title_zh: yes 一侧的成交价格，以美元计。

x-doc.desc_en: Execution price of the no side, expressed in dollars.
x-doc.title_zh: no 一侧的成交价格，以美元计。

taker_side.description: Which side was the taker (yes or no)

x-doc.desc_en: Which side initiated the trade by crossing the spread: `yes` or `no`.
x-doc.title_zh: 主动吃单成交的一方：`yes` 或 `no`。

created_time.description: Timestamp of the trade in seconds (Unix timestamp)

x-doc.desc_en: Moment at which the trade was executed.
x-doc.title_zh: 该笔成交发生的时间。

x-doc.desc_en: List of executed trades matching the filters.
x-doc.title_zh: 匹配筛选条件的成交记录列表。

x-doc.desc_en: Page size that was applied to this response.
x-doc.title_zh: 本次响应实际采用的每页数量。

total.description: Total number of trades matching the filters

x-doc.desc_en: Total number of trades matching the filters across all pages.
x-doc.title_zh: 在所有分页中匹配筛选条件的成交总数。

has_more.description: Whether there are more trades available

x-doc.desc_en: Whether further pages of results remain.
x-doc.title_zh: 是否还有更多分页结果。

pagination_key.description: Base64-encoded cursor for the next page. Only present when there are more results.

x-doc.desc_en: Cursor to pass as pagination_key on the next request; present only when more results remain.
x-doc.title_zh: 下次请求作为 pagination_key 传入的游标，仅在还有更多结果时出现。

x-doc.desc_en: Pagination metadata for the result set.
x-doc.title_zh: 结果集的分页元信息。

x-doc.desc_en: Short machine-readable error code for the failed request.
x-doc.title_zh: 请求失败时的简短机器可读错误码。

x-doc.desc_en: Human-readable explanation of why the request was rejected.
x-doc.title_zh: 对请求被拒原因的可读说明。

x-doc.heading_zh: 查询 Kalshi 成交记录 get_kalshi-trades
x-doc.desc_en: List historical executed trades for Kalshi markets, optionally filtered by market ticker and a time window, returning per-trade price, contract count and taker side. Results are cursor-paginated.
x-doc.description_zh: 列出 Kalshi 市场的历史成交记录，可按 market ticker 与时间区间筛选，返回每笔成交的价格、合约数量与吃单方向。结果采用游标分页。

parameters.name: market_ticker
parameters.description: The market ticker for the Kalshi market

get.description:
Fetches the current market price for a Kalshi market by `market_ticker`. When `at_time` is not provided, returns the most real-time price available. When `at_time` is provided, returns the historical market price at that specific timestamp. Returns prices for both yes and no sides.

**Example Request (with historical timestamp):**
```bash
curl 'https://api.domeapi.io/v1/kalshi/market-price/KXNFLGAME-25AUG16ARIDEN-ARI?at_time=1762164600' \
  -H 'Authorization: Bearer YOUR_TOKEN'
```

**Example Request (real-time price):**
```bash
curl 'https://api.domeapi.io/v1/kalshi/market-price/KXNFLGAME-25AUG16ARIDEN-ARI' \
  -H 'Authorization: Bearer YOUR_TOKEN'
```

parameters.name: at_time
parameters.description: Optional Unix timestamp (in seconds) to fetch a historical market price. If not provided, returns the most real-time price available.

x-doc.desc_en: Fetch the historical price as of this moment; omit to get the latest available price.
x-doc.title_zh: 查询截至该时刻的历史价格；省略则返回最新可得价格。

price.description: The yes side price in dollars (between 0 and 1)

x-doc.desc_en: Yes-side price, expressed in dollars as a probability-like value between 0 and 1.
x-doc.title_zh: yes 一侧价格，以美元计，取值介于 0 与 1 之间，类似概率。

at_time.description: The timestamp for which the price was fetched (Unix timestamp in seconds)

x-doc.desc_en: Moment the returned yes-side price corresponds to.
x-doc.title_zh: 所返回 yes 一侧价格对应的时间点。

x-doc.desc_en: Price information for the yes side of the market.
x-doc.title_zh: 市场 yes 一侧的价格信息。

price.description: The no side price in dollars (between 0 and 1)

x-doc.desc_en: No-side price, expressed in dollars as a probability-like value between 0 and 1.
x-doc.title_zh: no 一侧价格，以美元计，取值介于 0 与 1 之间，类似概率。

at_time.description: The timestamp for which the price was fetched (Unix timestamp in seconds)

x-doc.desc_en: Moment the returned no-side price corresponds to.
x-doc.title_zh: 所返回 no 一侧价格对应的时间点。

x-doc.desc_en: Price information for the no side of the market.
x-doc.title_zh: 市场 no 一侧的价格信息。

real_time.description: Response when `at_time` parameter is omitted (most recent price)

x-doc.desc_en: Short machine-readable error code for the failed request.
x-doc.title_zh: 请求失败时的简短机器可读错误码。

message.example: at_time must be a valid Unix timestamp in seconds

x-doc.desc_en: Human-readable explanation of why the request was rejected.
x-doc.title_zh: 对请求被拒原因的可读说明。

x-doc.desc_en: Short machine-readable error code indicating the market was not found.
x-doc.title_zh: 表示未找到该市场的简短机器可读错误码。

message.example: No price data found for market_ticker KXNFLGAME-25AUG16ARIDEN-ARI

x-doc.desc_en: Human-readable explanation that no price data exists for the requested market.
x-doc.title_zh: 对所请求市场不存在价格数据的可读说明。

x-doc.heading_zh: 查询 Kalshi 市场价格 get_kalshi-market-price
x-doc.desc_en: Get the price of a single Kalshi market identified by its market ticker, for both the yes and no sides. Returns the latest available price by default, or the historical price at a given timestamp when at_time is supplied.
x-doc.description_zh: 查询由 market ticker 指定的单个 Kalshi 市场价格，包含 yes 与 no 两侧。默认返回最新可得价格；传入 at_time 时返回该时间点的历史价格。

get.description: Fetches historical orderbook snapshots for a specific Kalshi market (ticker) over a specified time range. If no start_time and end_time are provided, returns the latest orderbook snapshot for the market. Returns snapshots of the order book including yes/no bids and asks with prices in both cents and dollars. All timestamps are in milliseconds. Orderbook data has history starting from October 29th, 2025. Note: When fetching the latest orderbook (without start/end times), the limit parameter is ignored.

x-doc.desc_en: Kalshi market ticker whose order book history is requested.
x-doc.title_zh: 要查询订单簿历史的 Kalshi 市场 ticker。

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Start time in Unix timestamp (milliseconds). Optional - if not provided along with end_time, returns the latest orderbook snapshot.

x-doc.desc_en: Lower bound of the snapshot time window; omit together with end_time to get only the latest snapshot.
x-doc.title_zh: 快照时间窗的下界；与 end_time 一并省略则只返回最新一条快照。

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: End time in Unix timestamp (milliseconds). Optional - if not provided along with start_time, returns the latest orderbook snapshot.

x-doc.desc_en: Upper bound of the snapshot time window; omit together with start_time to get only the latest snapshot.
x-doc.title_zh: 快照时间窗的上界；与 start_time 一并省略则只返回最新一条快照。

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of snapshots to return (default: 100, max: 200). Ignored when fetching the latest orderbook without start_time and end_time.

x-doc.desc_en: Maximum number of snapshots to return per page; ignored when fetching only the latest snapshot.
x-doc.title_zh: 每页返回的快照数量上限；仅取最新快照时该参数被忽略。

parameters.name: paginationKey
parameters.description: Base64-encoded cursor for efficient pagination. Returned in the previous response's pagination object.

x-doc.desc_en: Opaque cursor for fetching the next page; take it from the pagination object of the previous response.
x-doc.title_zh: 用于翻到下一页的不透明游标，取自上一次响应的 pagination 对象。

snapshots.description: Array of orderbook snapshots at different points in time

yes.description: Yes side orders with prices in cents

x-doc.desc_en: Resting yes-side orders, each as a [price, contract count] pair with price in cents.
x-doc.title_zh: yes 一侧的挂单，每项为 [价格, 合约数量] 对，价格以分计。

no.description: No side orders with prices in cents

x-doc.desc_en: Resting no-side orders, each as a [price, contract count] pair with price in cents.
x-doc.title_zh: no 一侧的挂单，每项为 [价格, 合约数量] 对，价格以分计。

yes_dollars.description: Yes side orders with prices in dollars

x-doc.desc_en: Resting yes-side orders, each as a [price, contract count] pair with price in dollars.
x-doc.title_zh: yes 一侧的挂单，每项为 [价格, 合约数量] 对，价格以美元计。

no_dollars.description: No side orders with prices in dollars

x-doc.desc_en: Resting no-side orders, each as a [price, contract count] pair with price in dollars.
x-doc.title_zh: no 一侧的挂单，每项为 [价格, 合约数量] 对，价格以美元计。

x-doc.desc_en: The bid levels of the order book at this snapshot, split by side and price unit.
x-doc.title_zh: 该快照时刻订单簿的报价档位，按方向与价格单位拆分。

timestamp.description: Timestamp of the snapshot in milliseconds

x-doc.desc_en: Moment this order book snapshot was captured.
x-doc.title_zh: 该订单簿快照的采集时间。

x-doc.desc_en: Ticker of the market this snapshot belongs to.
x-doc.title_zh: 该快照所属市场的 ticker。

x-doc.desc_en: Order book snapshots ordered through the requested time window.
x-doc.title_zh: 在所请求时间窗内排列的订单簿快照。

x-doc.desc_en: Page size that was applied to this response.
x-doc.title_zh: 本次响应实际采用的每页数量。

x-doc.desc_en: Number of snapshots returned in this page.
x-doc.title_zh: 本页返回的快照数量。

paginationKey.description: Base64-encoded cursor for fetching the next page of results. Only present when has_more is true.

x-doc.desc_en: Cursor to pass as paginationKey on the next request; present only when more results remain.
x-doc.title_zh: 下次请求作为 paginationKey 传入的游标，仅在还有更多结果时出现。

has_more.description: Whether there are more snapshots available

x-doc.desc_en: Whether further pages of snapshots remain.
x-doc.title_zh: 是否还有更多分页快照。

x-doc.desc_en: Pagination metadata for the result set.
x-doc.title_zh: 结果集的分页元信息。

x-doc.desc_en: Short machine-readable error code for the failed request.
x-doc.title_zh: 请求失败时的简短机器可读错误码。

message.example: ticker, start_time, and end_time are required

x-doc.desc_en: Human-readable explanation of why the request was rejected.
x-doc.title_zh: 对请求被拒原因的可读说明。

x-doc.heading_zh: 查询 Kalshi 订单簿历史 get_kalshi-orderbooks
x-doc.desc_en: Get historical order book snapshots for a single Kalshi market over a time window, returning yes/no bid levels in both cents and dollars. When no time window is given, returns only the latest snapshot. Results are cursor-paginated.
x-doc.description_zh: 查询单个 Kalshi 市场在某时间区间内的历史订单簿快照，返回 yes/no 两侧的报价档位（同时给出以分和以美元计的价格）。未指定时间区间时仅返回最新一条快照。结果采用游标分页。

BearerAuth.description: Your AIsa API key as a Bearer token.
